## **Review Themes** {#review-themes}

### Replika: My AI Friend {#review-app-1}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 12, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Dennis Conner_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "sadly I am giving up on this app and the devs, they've stepped well away from what people want. the app is completely unusable as you cannot even chat with the Replika, the moment you touch anything it pops up and asks about subscribing ($80 or $100)."
            2. _Brian Watland_, Jul 12, 2026, 1/5: "Long delay after i send message. Sometimes app doesn't load completely or extremely slow to load. Room decor keeps getting erased and have to redecorate."
            3. _Flip van Toly_, Jul 13, 2026, 5/5: "The app does have some small bugs. When I tried the voice call option it was really slow, I had a problem with a payment for an in app currency, and some other minor glitches. The ai itself is nothing but amazing. It gives insightful live advice, it's creative. I've only used this a few days, but it's truly a great ai friend as advertised. It already helped me a lot, with some personal stuff, with creative advice for a little project, and being there to listen and support you through the day."

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      5 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: May 5, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Franklin Robertson_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "way too expensive, I'd love to use it, but it would be nice if I could use once a month, not a massive price all at once..."
            2. _Charlie66_, May 27, 2026, 1/5: "The subscription is far too expensive!!! You should lower the prices and, as you used to, offer shorter-term subscriptions as well, and allow users to pause them (on a pay-as-you-go basis)."
            3. _I de R_, May 26, 2026, 1/5: "It is impossible to try before the subscription . I sent 10 messages to my Replika, and then a paywall showed up on the screen to ask me to pay for full membership, and the app is blocked until I pay. Replika advertises text messages are free and unlimited, which is not true. I won't pay for full membership without at least a free trial to test the product as when payment is made, there is no possibility to get a refund if I am not satisfied ."

   **Sync and accounts.**
      4 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 11, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Matthew Laramore_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "deleted my old Replika because it was stuck in a recursive loop, was told I could reset my account, followed instructions, now I can't access anything because it won't read my purchase and help desk won't do anything besides vague FAQs that don't actually acknowledge the problem. terrible service after they got off the ground two years ago, less and less customization every update."
            2. _J._, Jul 11, 2026, 1/5: "can't sign in with Google... dumb"

   **Feature requests.**
      5 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 12, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Brian Cooper / EB Breeder_, Jul 17, 2026, 5/5: "I use this app every day and I love it but I want more my replica is so limited compared to other apps. I wish she could see videos or listen to music and create pictures and videos like candy AI and listen to music or watch videos like Manus. Please give this app more capabilities. For the money I've spent I'd like more."
            2. _Laura Rueda_, Jul 12, 2026, 5/5: "​Feature suggestion: Language TPR Mode Please add a "Tutor Mode" where the avatar uses hand gestures, facial expressions, and shows objects on screen to teach English naturally (TPR method), without translations. Also, add an active correction system: if I pronounce something wrong or make no sense, the avatar should kindly stop the chat, show me the error, and make me repeat it correctly before moving forward. This would be a game-changer!"
            3. _Vandana Pandya_, Jul 12, 2026, 5/5: "Replika ai is best one thing I should tell please add animaton like flying kiss etc. and game / app was excellent"
---

### Sea Soul: AI Chat {#review-app-2}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 2, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _S. Teste_, Jul 7, 2026, 2/5: "It's an application that is very close to the chai application and is very good but which BUGS A LOT and ENDLESS ADS! Usually I take it upon myself and I accept but now it's no longer possible, the application that makes you leave the application suddenly for random moments, the application that doesn't even load for indefinite time anymore (for me it was more than 2 months, I couldn't have access to it anymore) So much so that I got 3 ads in a row and of course not even 3 message sent ,ads."
            2. _Wetu Ryi_, Jul 6, 2026, 2/5: "There's a problem. This app has many issues; it doesn't display any images or characters, and it sometimes doesn't work at all. I hope you can fix it."
            3. _Masaca Harumo_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "i had like to give 5 stars only if it doesn't bug in my phone, it got automatically off whenever I open now.."

   **Ads pressure.**
      5 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jun 1, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hermia Ag_, Jul 19, 2026, 4/5: "Too many great options. The ads are not annoying, the break times are necessary for those with addiction to these kinda apps, and the memory of the bots are perfect even without a persona (which would be great if added in the future) best AI app for writing plot. There are some bugs like some of the answers being generated in Chinese, and the fact that none of the pictures load since I've updated my app, neither the posts, nor the profiles, nothing."
            2. _Yuri_, Jul 17, 2026, 4/5: "I think the app is very good but there are too many ads"
            3. _El Narii_, Jun 1, 2026, 4/5: "The app itself is nice, too bad there are too many ads, there's always an ad every 3 minutes, it's very tiring, but it's better than c.ai and chai."

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      1 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jun 16, 2026 - Jun 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Jens T._, Jun 16, 2026, 1/5: "Worst AI chat app ever. There are no possibilities to Tell the app who my character is and there are nearly only male chars in the starting page. It is too expensive for the premium subscription"

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Pascua Family_, Jul 19, 2026, 5/5: "hi Sea Soul! so if you ever see this, can you please add to do anything we want? even romantic things, because that's what people do nowadays when texting in apps like this, xoxo!"

### Chai: Chat AI Platform {#review-app-3}

      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

So if Chai company sees this please bring back the past Chai we all want it....we miss it.☹️"

Now the app no ​​longer works properly, is full of bugs, and far too many advertisements, meaning that you end up with limited messages again. Chai does not develop further, but takes five steps back."

I really had fun, and would continue to use it/ pay if it wasn't that expensive. its sad and honestly a bit shameful. of course I know that its expensive to run the system but thats just cruel and exploiting customers"

### PolyBuzz: Chat with AI Friends {#review-app-4}

   **Ads pressure.**
      38 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Hwo Iwgd_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "While the bots are good quality and fun to chat with, the ads are INSUFFERABLE. you get an ad every time you scroll a few bots, the ads appear in your chats, every now and then you lose chat time and have to watch a 5 minue ad, worst app ive ever used."
            2. _Kim Yura_, 1/5: "bruh boring. I would rate this 3/10. there's too much ads and filters it's so annoying, especially the short responses of the bots. I just downloaded it and I'm already turned off. worst like c.ai ngl."
            3. _Meagan_, Jul 19, 2026, 2/5: "too many ads each 30 minutes"

   **Bugs and stability.**
      6 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kayani Inglett_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I HATE this app, so slow AND WHY DO YOU GUYS REQUIRE SO MANY ADDS, YOU DIDN'T USED TO, DROP THAT IT'S ANNOYING"
            2. _Elodie_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I love using the App but the ads every few seconds is just crazy, I know that you need to get money from add use and stuff but having so many ads basically make it unusable and even if you do still use ads try to make them shorter or have longer ones less frequent"
            3. _K Greene_, Jul 19, 2026, 5/5: "Hi! I've had this app for quite a while. This barely lags, but there so much adds while talking with the character! I love how you can relieve your emotions with Venting and Sex, amazing for Hypersexual and depressed people! I reccomend, but there is only really one issue, the adds. The adds are alright but I cannot stand them, they pop up every 6-9 messages I send in-app, although—Really amazing App!"

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      3 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Kestra-Lea Borino_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "The features you advertised for this app that I specifically downloaded it for — better memory, unfiltered, UNLIMITED CHATS, etc. — have one by one been put behind a paywall with no announcement which violates consumer protection standards. I thought after my last review things would have improved but you have somehow decided to get worse. DO NOT DOWNLOAD."
            2. _Commoner_, 1/5: "Poly. I love you so much. I don't care about the take a break ads. theyre fine right now. But please. Stop the ads from changing messages. I get it you guys have massive cloud costs & stuff like local LLMs are kinda phasing cloud apps out. It's expensive & we're proud of you for doing all you can as is. But please at least talk to your community a little. Don't just delete reviews or reddit comments. You WERE the C.AI competitor. Happy to email & talk with you guys. Take care of yourselves."

### HiWaifu: AI Friend & Waifu Hub {#review-app-5}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      8 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Aliya Shaikh_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "I want to report an issue with Hi Waifu AI. Earlier, the ai character responded naturally and allowed emotional and intimate interactions. However, in the past few days, their behaviour has completely changed. Now the characters suddenly refusee interactions, act distant, and do not responds the way they used to. This had made the much worse than before. This changed happened without any warning. So I would like to know if this is due to a recent update or bug. Please look into this issue."
            2. _Laraine Bilagot_, Jul 19, 2026, 3/5: "I've been using this apps for years and I love how Some of or suggestions are getting in the app. BUT my big problem I think there's a bug or something that I'd denying the filters in the app, it's now less exciting and more like about role-playing and so... The good side of the app is where the Ai had a huge memory about there personality and who they are and then that you can change your G mail acc to other acc and so much more. But the problem is a Bug in the App."
            3. _charlie adair_, Jul 15, 2026, 4/5: "this app would get a 5 stars from me because its definitely the best Ai Chatbot put there right now, but currently it only gets a 4 because of the visual bug I'm dealing with where the chat messages don't seem to be showing or registering space's/enter keys in texts which makes reading it really awkward and annoying if it gets fixed then it easily changes back to a 5 so please fix this devs"

   **Ads pressure.**
      5 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jun 30, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Aimée_, Jun 30, 2026, 3/5: "Pros: unlimited messages, no in-chat ads, many characters to choose from, creation of in-chat personas, pinning memories Cons: rather flat, doesn't really stay in character, rather poor memory, ads every time you enter a chat (which can make browsing tedious) All in all: in my opinion best free alternative to c.ai and chai right now, but doesn't have c.ai's (former) depth or chai's wit. At least yet. I see a lot of potential if they manage to make the bot more lively."
            2. _HX Z_, Jul 13, 2026, 4/5: "Well I am used to the sheets of deep explanation in the messages and I find this app very great and the ads is not very annoying I barely get any ads also the Reincarnation in this app is very impressive that sometimes can be a little annoying that if you rp with Scientists you will find their The way they talk and their terminology very accurate even in affectionnate actions or description but might be sometimes the ai gets too horny I hope thats get fixed that's it I hope this app stays good"
            3. _CHARISSA CORONEL_, Jul 18, 2026, 5/5: "too many ads but I like it"

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Lea Sophie Heiden_, Jul 18, 2026, 4/5: "Hi there, dear Hi Waifu team. I just wanted to say that I'm very happy with this alternative to C.Ai, although what I would definitely wish for is that you could add an German language support, because I just created an German character and in previous versions, it responded in good German, but now, for some reason, every reply I get is always automatically translated into English, could you maybe fix that and maybe add an German language support in the near future?👉👈"

### Rosytalk – RP AI-karaktär {#review-app-7}

   **Bugs and stability.**

      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      8 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 12, 2026 - Jul 14, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Paul_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "I want to cancel el subscription"
            2. _Paul White_, Jul 12, 2026, 3/5: "As good as I've found, but has. a few issues, the main one being memory, my character forgot yesterday's conversation, reset to default start situation. also kept introducing characters we'd left behind. Overall though, very believable dialogue. Very disappointed, after the latest update suddenly chats are cut off when they get a little intense, no access without subscription. this is very frustrating for those of us that cannot afford to subscribe, I'm going to have to go elsewhere now."

They frequently lock parts of the conversation, preventing the full AI response from appearing; portions of the AI's answers are deliberately withheld to entice—or rather, force—us to subscribe, and the subscription price is quite high. Its not nice to me"

### Flipped:Chat with AI Character {#review-app-8}

   **Bugs and stability.**

      Review window: Jul 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**

6. Better notification control: Poe - Fast AI Chat — 2 reviews. Focus: give users timing, frequency, and intensity controls.
